svg.title: AI Agent Complete Workflow
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the complete workflow of an AI agent from user input through perception, planning, tool use, memory, and response generation back to the user.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of user input can an AI agent receive?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent perceive and understand input?')
sendPrompt('What types of memory does an AI agent use?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent plan and reason?')
g.text: Break task into steps, set goals

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an AI agent decide whether to use tools?')
sendPrompt('What tools can an AI agent use?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent process tool results and observations?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent update its memory after taking action?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent generate its final response?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent evaluate whether its goal is complete?')
sendPrompt('What forms can an AI agent output take?')
